        SELECT 1
        FROM [calculator_run_billing_file_metadata] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c].[id] = [c0].[calculator_run_id]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

WHERE [c].[relative_year] = @__request_RelativeYear_Value_0
ORDER BY [c].[created_at] DESC',N'@__request_RelativeYear_Value_0 int',@__request_RelativeYear_Value_0=2025

exec sp_executesql N'SET IMPLICIT_TRANSACTIONS OFF;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
MERGE [country_apportionment] USING (
VALUES (@p0, @p1, @p2, @p3, 0),
(@p4, @p5, @p6, @p7, 1),
(@p8, @p9, @p10, @p11, 2),
(@p12, @p13, @p14, @p15, 3)) AS i ([apportionment], [calculator_run_id], [cost_type_id], [country_id], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([apportionment], [calculator_run_id], [cost_type_id], [country_id])
